words.def: a narcotic that is considered a hard drug; a highly addictive morphine derivative; intravenous injection provides the fastest and most intense rush
a man distinguished by exceptional courage and nobility and strength
words.zh: n. 英雄, 超越常人者, 男主角
n. 租金, 租用, 僱用

words.def: a heavy ductile magnetic metallic element; is silver-white in pure form but readily rusts; used in construction and tools and armament; plays a role in the transport of oxygen by the blood
words.zh: n. 鐵, 熨斗, 鐵器, 堅強, 烙鐵, 鐐銬

words.def: the smallest whole number or a numeral representing this number
